# Standup Generator

> Satirical standup meeting note generator with retro CRT terminal aesthetic.

## What This Project Is

Standup Generator is a frontend-only React web application that generates humorous, randomized standup meeting notes. It satirizes corporate agile culture with a retro CRT terminal visual style. Users click a button to generate a fake standup update (yesterday, today, blockers, mood), then copy it to their clipboard.

## Tech Stack

- React 18 with TypeScript (strict mode)
- Vite 5 (build tool and dev server)
- Tailwind CSS 3 (utility-first styling)
- Lucide React (icon library, minimally used)
- ESLint 9 with typescript-eslint (linting)
- No backend, no database, no API calls
- @supabase/supabase-js is a dependency but is not used

## Repository Structure

- src/App.tsx — Main application component with generation logic
- src/components/CrtOverlay.tsx — CRT scanline, vignette, and beam visual effects
- src/components/StandupCard.tsx — Reusable card for standup sections (yesterday, today, blockers)
- src/components/StandupOutput.tsx — Output display with copy-to-clipboard and regenerate
- src/data/standup-data.ts — All standup phrases (15 each for yesterday, today, blockers) and 5 moods
- src/utils/glitch.ts — Text glitch effect and generic random picker utility
- src/index.css — Tailwind directives and custom keyframe animations
- src/main.tsx — React DOM entry point

## Key Design Decisions

- Pure frontend app with no server dependencies
- All standup content is hardcoded (not fetched from an API)
- CRT visual effects are CSS-only (scanlines, vignette, animated beam)
- Title text has a glitch animation that runs every 3.5 seconds
- Clipboard API is used for copy functionality
- Color scheme: cyan (#00ffff) primary, green (#00ff41) secondary, red (#ff0000) tertiary on black

## Development

```
npm install        # Install dependencies
npm run dev        # Dev server at localhost:5173
npm run build      # Production build
npm run typecheck  # Type checking
npm run lint       # Linting
```
